title: D3letes Better Cords
description: its a hud that adds cords and what way your facing and also adds a player radar for public severs all you got to do is click tab and the hud shows
body:
# D3lete's Better Coords
A simple yet powerful Coord HUD for Minecraft.

D3lete's Better Coords adds a customizable coordinate HUD that opens when you press 
<details>
<summary>to open the menu</summary>

TAB 
</details>

###  It shows:

- Your current coordinates (X, Y, Z)

- The direction you're facing

- A player radar to see nearby players

> Perfect for PvP, survival, or just knowing where you are without pressing F3. Lightweight, easy to use, and designed to keep your screen clean while giving you the info you need.
